transcript.text: Koi bahut badi cheez nahi hai, aap log hamari bakery se order dega?
Arre, aapne jo order karna hoga, main uska record rakhi hoon. Sab kuch correctly pata chal rha hai? Ab mere paas khud ke paas kaisa hain? Aapka naam kya hain?
Namaste. Kya aap bakery se order karne aaye hain? (How can I help you with a bakery order?)
Namaste bhai, aap ke liye kya chahiye?
Arre, sab theek hai. Who is this, please?

transcript_text: Thank you. Koi bahut badi cheez nahi hai, aap log hamari bakery se order dega? Arre, aapne jo order karna hoga, main uska record rakhi hoon. Sab kuch correctly pata chal rha hai? Ab mere paas khud ke paas kaisa hain? Aapka naam kya hain? Hello. Namaste. Kya aap bakery se order karne aaye hain? (How can I help you with a bakery order?) Hello, hello Namaste bhai, aap ke liye kya chahiye? Hello, hello. Arre, sab theek hai. Who is this, please?
